stemHtml: Which of these statements about an aeroplane`s hydraulic system is correct?

options.a: The hydraulic reservoir contains a membrane and is pressurised by nitrogen on one side of this membrane.
options.b: The pumps are always electrically driven because they need to deliver a high pressure of 3000 psi.
options.c: A hydraulic leak in a return line does not affect the functioning of the hydraulic system.
options.d: The filters, the pressure relief valve(s), the by-pass valve(s), and the fire shut-off valve are safety features installed in the system.
